name: Kansas City Chiefs
description: Lamar Hunt's Chiefs — from Dallas Texans to four Lombardi trophies in the Mahomes era.

questions.q: Who founded the Kansas City Chiefs (and the American Football League)?

source.notes: Hunt is also the namesake of the AFC Championship trophy.

questions.q: What was the team's original name when it played in Dallas before moving to Kansas City?

source.notes: Played in Dallas 1960–1962 before relocating to Kansas City in 1963.

questions.q: In what year did the Dallas Texans officially become the Kansas City Chiefs?
Whose nickname inspired the new 'Chiefs' name when the team moved to Kansas City?

source.notes: Mayor Bartle's longtime Boy Scouts nickname was 'Chief.'

questions.q: Who was the team's first head coach, from 1960 to 1974?
Which AFL Championship did the Dallas Texans win in 1962, defeating the Houston Oilers in double overtime?

source.notes: Game lasted 77 minutes 54 seconds — longest championship game in AFL/NFL history at the time.

questions.q: Whom did the Chiefs defeat to win Super Bowl IV (their first Super Bowl title)?

source.notes: 23-7. Played January 11, 1970 — the last AFL-vs-NFL Super Bowl before the merger.

questions.q: Which quarterback was MVP of Super Bowl IV?

source.notes: Dawson played 14 seasons for the Chiefs and is in the Hall of Fame.

questions.q: Whom did the Chiefs defeat in Super Bowl LIV (after the 2019 season)?
Whom did Kansas City defeat to win Super Bowl LVII (after the 2022 season)?
Whom did Kansas City defeat in Super Bowl LVIII to repeat as champions (2023 season)?

source.notes: 25-22 in overtime. First repeat champ since the 2003-04 Patriots.

questions.q: Which team beat the Chiefs in Super Bowl LV, preventing back-to-back titles?

source.notes: Tom Brady's first season in Tampa, 31-9.

questions.q: How many touchdown passes did Patrick Mahomes throw in the 2018 regular season — when he won NFL MVP?

source.notes: Joined Peyton Manning and Tom Brady as the only QBs with 50+ TD seasons (at the time).

questions.q: Who has been the Chiefs' head coach since 2013?

source.notes: Reid previously coached the Eagles for 14 seasons.

questions.q: Which Chiefs Hall-of-Fame tight end caught more passes than any TE in NFL history during his career?

source.notes: Spent 1997-2008 in KC, then five seasons in Atlanta. 1,325 career receptions.

questions.q: Which Chiefs linebacker set the NFL single-game sack record with seven in 1990?

source.notes: Set the record vs. Seattle on November 11, 1990. He died after a 2000 car accident; inducted into the HoF in 2009.

questions.q: What is the name of the Chiefs' home stadium, famous for being one of the loudest in the NFL?

source.notes: Officially GEHA Field at Arrowhead Stadium since 2021. Holds the Guinness record for loudest crowd roar at a sports stadium.

questions.q: Which Chiefs star tight end became a household name in 2023 after dating Taylor Swift?

source.notes: Travis is the younger brother of Eagles center Jason Kelce.

questions.q: In what year was the AFL-NFL merger officially completed, moving the Chiefs into the NFL?

source.notes: Agreement reached in 1966; merger completed for the 1970 season.

questions.q: Which Chiefs head coach led the team to seven playoff appearances during the 1990s?
